components/avatar.title: DeskAvatar
components/avatar.description: Circular avatar showing user initials. Uses primary color at 15% opacity as background.

components/button.title: DeskButton
components/button.description: Primary action button. Full-width by default with theme primary color.

components/card.title: DeskCard
components/card.description: Grid card with icon and label. Fixed height for uniform grid layouts. Used for module navigation, shortcuts, and workspace items.

components/checkbox.title: DeskCheckbox
components/checkbox.description: Toggle switch with label. Uses Material Switch internally, styled with theme colors.

components/filter-chip.title: DeskFilterChip
components/filter-chip.description: Removable filter tag showing active filter key-value pairs. Used in list views to display active filters.

components/icon-box.title: DeskIconBox
components/icon-box.description: Rounded square container for icons. Used inside DeskCard and anywhere an icon needs a background container.

components/list-item.title: DeskListItem
components/list-item.description: Standard list row with title, subtitle, status badge, and navigation chevron. Designed for document lists.

components/search-bar.title: DeskSearchBar
components/search-bar.description: Inline search input with search icon and clear button. Designed for embedding in navbars and list headers.

components/section-header.title: DeskSectionHeader
components/section-header.description: Uppercase section label with divider. Used to separate groups in forms and link lists.

components/select.title: DeskSelect
components/select.description: Dropdown picker with label support. Opens a material dropdown menu on tap.

components/status-badge.title: DeskStatusBadge
components/status-badge.description: Color-coded status indicator for document states. Automatically resolves colors from status strings or docstatus integers.

components/text-field.title: DeskTextField
components/text-field.description: Outlined text input with optional label, placeholder, validation indicator, and keyboard type support.

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.description: DeskUI is a professional UI component library for business and enterprise mobile applications. It provides a complete design system with components optimized for ERP, CRM, accounting, and data-heavy apps.

layout/bottom-bar.title: DeskBottomBar
layout/bottom-bar.description: Bottom tab bar with icons and optional badge counts. Supports any number of tabs.

layout/navbar.title: DeskNavBar
layout/navbar.description: Top navigation bar combining logo, search bar, notification bell with badge, and user avatar. The primary navigation element.

layout/page-header.title: DeskPageHeader
layout/page-header.description: Page-level header with back navigation, title, and action slot. Used at the top of list views, form views, and report views.

layout/scaffold.title: DeskScaffold
layout/scaffold.description: Full app shell combining navbar, content area, and bottom bar. The top-level layout component for DeskUI apps.

layout/sidebar.title: DeskSidebar
layout/sidebar.description: Slide-out navigation panel with hierarchical items. Supports expand/collapse for items with children, active state highlighting, and indented sub-items.

layout/tab-bar.title: DeskTabBar
layout/tab-bar.description: Horizontal scrollable tab bar for form sections. Highlights the active tab with primary color.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: DeskUI uses a composable theme system built on CompositionLocal. Every visual property — colors, typography, shapes, spacing, and sizes — is configurable.
